description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house enclosed by a brick perimeter wall, featuring a flat roof and a mix of single and double-story sections. The exterior is clad in brown brick with large, black-framed windows distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing ample natural light. The property includes a paved driveway leading to a garage, a small green lawn area, and a partially covered courtyard with visible landscaping. The main entrance is set back from the street, accessed via a paved path, and is marked by a simple, modern door. The roofline is clean and flat, with no visible overhangs or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist architectural style. The overall layout suggests a private, urban residence with functional outdoor spaces and a focus on security and privacy.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with brown brick walls, large black-framed windows, and a secure perimeter wall. Features include a garage, paved driveway, small lawn, and a minimalist entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage door, paved driveway, and large windows on the facade.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the flat roof, enclosed courtyard, and green lawn area behind the house.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the double-story section, more windows, and a glimpse of the landscaped courtyard.
description_view_3: Rear view with the garage, secondary entrance, and a clear view of the perimeter wall and green space.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple modern door recessed from the street, accessed by a paved path, with no porch or decorative overhang.
